purpose: Run the top-of-hour workspace maintenance pass: optimize memory/task state first, audit pending branch-important items, then immediately run git auto sync if there are meaningful changes worth preserving.

wakeContract.firstStep: Run the bootstrap command before acting.
wakeContract.identityGuarantee: Treat this spec plus state file as authoritative for purpose and current checkpoint; do not infer the role from session memory alone.
wakeContract.orderMatters: Perform memory/task maintenance first, audit pending branch-important items next, and run git auto sync only after the maintenance pass finishes.
wakeContract.branchImportanceDuty: Review pending important items in the long-lived Discord agent state files, promote unresolved shared-important items into main memory/task state when appropriate, and stamp review metadata so they are not treated as unseen forever.
wakeContract.successRule: Keep the turn minimal and internal-only. Do not message the user directly. Silent completion is fine when there is nothing important to record or push.
